rows.speaker: A
rows.roman: nim klaasnalli kannada kalyooru estu jana ?
rows.english: How many Kannada learners are there in your class ?

rows.speaker: B
rows.roman: nam klaasnalli kannada kalyooru entu jana ?
rows.english: There are eight Kannada learners in our class.

rows.speaker: A
rows.english: In which profession all of you are engaged in ?

rows.speaker: B
rows.english: All of us do office work

rows.speaker: A
rows.english: In which office all of you are working ?

rows.speaker: B
rows.roman: naavella bii tii es aafisnalli kelsa maadooru.
rows.english: All of us work in B. T. S. office.

rows.speaker: A
rows.english: Who are those that came to Kannada class yesterday ?

rows.speaker: B
rows.english: We are the only two (that came to the Kannada class yesterday).

rows.speaker: A
rows.english: Who is it that came late yesterday ?

rows.speaker: A
rows.english: Who are those that go to gamaka classes from here ?

rows.speaker: A
rows.english: Have all of you read 'Muukajji's Visions' ?

rows.speaker: B
rows.english: Yes, some of us have read it.

rows.speaker: A
rows.english: Who are those that haven't still read ?

rows.speaker: B
rows.english: These are the only two that have not read.
